signals.headline: Bank of Korea Holds Rates Steady at 2
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Rates Steady at 2.5% in April 2026 Meeting, Signals Mid-to-High 2% Inflation Outlook for 2026 Amid Recent 2.2% March CPI Rise | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][5]

March 2026 CPI confirmed at 2.2% YoY (up from 2.0%, below 2.4% forecasts), with core inflation easing to 2.2%; BoK's April decision emphasized data-dependent policy without hikes, despite oil-driven pressures.[1][3][5]  
I

signals.headline: US-Iran Talks Reach Stalemate on Strait of Hormuz; No Agreement Confirmed Despite Progress Reports | NO | MED confidence
signals.raw:
US-Iran Talks Reach Stalemate on Strait of Hormuz; No Agreement Confirmed Despite Progress Reports | NO | MED confidence**

US-Iran negotiations on April 11, 2026, led by US Vice President JD Vance with Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, hit a deadlock over Strait of Hormuz control, with mismatched goals: US seeks narrow de-escalation on shipping and detainees, while Iran demands broader concessions
matched_markets: Will 60 ships transit the Strait of Hormuz on any day by April 30?
Will Jared Kushner have a diplomatic meeting with Iran by April 30?
